description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte light blue exterior. The can features a simple, modern design with a large, bold white sans-serif text on one side, listing product information in stacked lines. A stylized orange geometric logo is visible on the lower portion of the can, adding a pop of color and visual interest. The top of the can is metallic silver with a classic pull tab opening mechanism. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation or textural embellishments. The overall look is clean and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description: A matte light blue aluminum beer can with bold white text and an orange geometric logo, featuring a silver pull tab top. The design is clean, modern, and minimalistic.
description_view_0: The can is mostly light blue with a partial view of an orange geometric logo near the bottom right; the silver pull tab top is visible.
description_view_1: This view shows more of the orange geometric logo on the lower left, with the rest of the can remaining plain blue and the top visible.
description_view_2: The front label is visible, displaying large white text in a stacked format on the blue background, with the silver top and pull tab also in view.
description_view_3: The can's main label is prominent, showing bold white text on the blue surface, with the orange logo partially visible on the side.
attribute_graphic_design: The can features a minimalistic design with a matte light blue background, bold white sans-serif text, and a striking orange geometric logo. The overall style is clean and modern, with simple typography and limited color palette.
